title: Philippus the presbyter.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Philip, the presbyter Jerome’s best pupil, published a Commentary on Job, written in an unaffected style.
I have read his Familiar letters, exceedingly witty, exhorting the endurance of poverty and sufferings.
He died in the reign of Martianus and Avitus.
